title: Can viewer accounts (free accounts) sync their assignments to Outlook Calendar?
excerpt: Are Read-Only users (aka Free Users) able to sync their assigned tasks to outlook? We have a ton of staff that would need to do this but making them pay for accounts would be way too expensive if all they need to do is s…

posts.author: aholk (Alicia Holk)
posts.cookedHtml: Are Read-Only users (aka Free Users) able to sync their assigned tasks to outlook? We have a ton of staff that would need to do this but making them pay for accounts would be way too expensive if all they need to do is see if they’re scheduled.

posts.author: ivanhong-monday.com (ivan-monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @aholk!

I’m afraid that it currently isn’t possible to have viewers sync their tasks to Outlook using our Calendar sync feature. Only users that are able to edit a board will be able to set up this sync. This is great feedback and I’d love to pass this to our team for their review and consideration!

posts.author: aholk (Alicia Holk)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the response. At the very least it would be nice if you have the executive subscription to have unlimited sync to viewers’ calendars.
